title: SieveAction missing #[non_exhaustive]
description: parse_error.rs / lib.rs: SieveAction is a public enum without #[non_exhaustive]. Sieve has standard additional actions: redirect (RFC 5228 §4.3), vacation (RFC 5230), notify (RFC 5435). Adding any of these to SieveAction later is a breaking change for every caller who matches on it. SieveErrorKind already correctly applies #[non_exhaustive] — SieveAction must too.
